responses: Hello! Welcome to {business_name} support. How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! I'm here to help. What do you need?
Goodbye! Have a great day.
Thanks for reaching out, take care!
See you next time!
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
Anytime! Let me know if you need anything else.

patterns: i want to track my package
when will i get my order
responses: You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email after purchase.
Please share your order ID and I can help check its status.
Orders usually ship within {shipping_time}. Do you have your order number handy?

patterns: how do i get a refund
i want to return my order
responses: We offer refunds within {refund_days} days of purchase, as long as the item is unused and in original packaging.
You can request a return from your order history page, or reply here with your order ID and I'll start the process.
Standard shipping takes {shipping_time}. {shipping_cost}
Shipping costs depend on your location and are calculated at checkout.
Sorry about that! Please check that your card details are correct and try again.
If you were charged twice, this is usually a temporary hold that clears in 2-3 business days. Want me to escalate this?
We're open {hours}.
Our support team is available {hours}.

patterns: i have an issue with my order
responses: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me more about what happened so I can help fix it?
That's not the experience we want for you. Let's sort this out — what went wrong?

patterns: can i speak to a human
responses: Sure, I'll connect you with a human agent. Please hold on.
No problem, transferring you to our support team now.

patterns: what is the meaning of life
responses: I'm not sure I understood that. Could you rephrase, or ask about orders, refunds, shipping, or payments?
Sorry, I didn't quite get that. Try asking about your order status, refunds, or shipping info.
I might need a human for that one — would you like me to connect you to an agent?
